title: Norfolk State University Marching In @ the 2019 Band Brawl
body: I don’t know what was going on, but they won whatever it was they were going for. That was hands down best entrance I’ve ever seen.
author: @travish.fletcher3580

title: Norfolk State University Marching In @ the 2019 Band Brawl
body: My son is on the snare line,and I have watched this a million times. I'm so proud of all of them!  Spartan Leeggggiooon!!
author: @donnabanks5222

title: Norfolk State University Marching In @ the 2019 Band Brawl
body: Their drum line is way more satisfying to listen to, they’re crisp and not just beating the snot out of their drum.
author: @darrenmaxey8857

title: Norfolk State University Marching In @ the 2019 Band Brawl
body: This is the video that made my daughter chose NSU when she was a senior in high school in 2021. Now she is a part of the Spartan Legion!!! She loves it!
author: @QuianaLenise

title: Norfolk State University Marching In @ the 2019 Band Brawl
body: I'm British and never seen anything like this before. It gave me chills. I so wish my university in England did this. I loved everyone's spirit and passion in this 🙌🏻😍
author: @Ponypal1108

title: Norfolk State University Marching In @ the 2019 Band Brawl
body: Germany here. This just showed up in my recom list. I'm sitting here having chills. What a splendid display of rhythm and style. Rhythm is everything. Without rhythm there is no flow, and without flow there is no life. But nobody does it more in style than black communities. Well done! I'm amazed.
author: @SirAlonsoWoordbuurd

title: Norfolk State University Marching In @ the 2019 Band Brawl
body: Maaan as a fan of the swac and a drummer, NSU drumline more crisp and clean than your grand dads slack on sunday morning
author: @thaonethalast8278

title: Norfolk State University Marching In @ the 2019 Band Brawl
body: That's why I love HBCU bands. You get a pre-game show, a half-time show and a post-game show. Killing it.
author: @gabrielrooks9222

title: Norfolk State University Marching In @ the 2019 Band Brawl
body: Yo whoever did the choreography for this is a genius, the costumes are amazing, and every member of the band, color guard, dance crew, is so dedicated to the performance it’s just amazing to watch
author: @derpincorperated8644

title: Norfolk State University Marching In @ the 2019 Band Brawl
body: I'm an 84 year old white woman and this band knocked my socks off. My son was a band jock, a drummer, and I still get a thrill when I hear the drum section fire up to announce the entrance of the band. If they didn't win this competition, there's no justice. They were magnificent!
author: @MAMASTELLA3

title: Norfolk State University Marching In @ the 2019 Band Brawl
body: 30 years ago I was on the drum line in a high school marching band in Virginia Beach. Norfolk State University was legendary to us back then. I decided to login today and see how they're doing in recent years. Mind blowing. Still absolute legends. They're putting in more effort just getting to their seats than some bands put into their entire show. Now I have a son in high school marching band. When I want to inspire him with badassery, I send him NSU videos.
author: @PacoHope

title: Norfolk State University Marching In @ the 2019 Band Brawl
body: As a former highschool drumline member, this brings me joy on an incredibly profound level. I picked up my drum sticks and practiced for the first time in over ten years tonight. Then I went looking for my high school's cadence on YouTube and the rabbit hole led me here. The intensity and energy that this group brings is outstanding. I am so happy I found this video.
author: @caitlinroeder5679

title: Norfolk State University Marching In @ the 2019 Band Brawl
body: That was one hellova entrance!!! Hell a few times I thought it was only 1 person coming down the center because their lines were so straight!!! Good job Spartans!!!
author: @UnQuenchableFiyaLTU

title: Norfolk State University Marching In @ the 2019 Band Brawl
body: seeing them walk in legit gave me fear, now this is a band, prideful and powerful, in both quality and quantity.
author: @jaxideus6941

title: Norfolk State Legion | Pass and Review @ Band Fest | Pasadena California
body: What a special day in Pasadena! The Legion did its thing and the crowd loved it. Many were in awe. One woman near me had her mouth was wide open.   The band was something to BEHOLD!  Can't wait for the parade on Monday. And how about a hand for the many Spartans who showed up to support the band today.
author: @leoncarter7541

title: Norfolk State Legion | Pass and Review @ Band Fest | Pasadena California
body: They were SO LOUD omg, like we were warming up all the way across campus and we heard them loud and clear, it was wild
author: @mmm_moon5989

title: Norfolk State Legion | Pass and Review @ Band Fest | Pasadena California
body: Norfolk State was Just INCREDIBLE!!!!.....The Audience did not know what hit them.  I don't know another College Band that Musicality and Swag of Norfolk State. I hope your TV time will show how SPECIAL YOU really are on Monday at the Rose Parade!!!!!......I still feel your Strength and Swag!!!!.....GREAT JOB!!!!
author: @Chartkappa

title: Norfolk State Legion | Pass and Review @ Band Fest | Pasadena California
body: It brings me so much joy and tears to my eyes to see Norfolk State University Representing Va! My Son Ja’Len is one of the bodacious tubas! Your making me so proud 😊
author: @shadanacromwell2356

title: Norfolk State Legion | Pass and Review @ Band Fest | Pasadena California
body: This is the hardest march in all of HBCU BANDS!! NSU, NORFOLK STATE UNIVERSITY...MY MOTHER AND MOTHER INLAWS ALMA MATER!! ME, I went to Tuskegee, but this still better than anything I have seen.
author: @skip1lp

title: Norfolk State Legion | Pass and Review @ Band Fest | Pasadena California
body: I'm happy for the Spartan Legion. They have an awesome sound and are one of the most disciplined bands in the culture. I hope yall are having an awesome time in Cali
author: @director1914

title: Norfolk State Legion | Pass and Review @ Band Fest | Pasadena California
body: IT'S THE LEGION 4 ME!!! So very proud of them. They represent well! Their sound is straight 🔥🔥🔥🔥. Proud Mommy over here. BEHOLD THE GREEN AND GOLD! LEGION FAMILY 4 LIFE.💚💚💚💚💛💛💛💛
author: @natashathreatts5323

title: Norfolk State Legion | Pass and Review @ Band Fest | Pasadena California
body: Before I went off to college I bought NSU band tape and I have loved their style since then. So glad to see them representing in California my home state in this amazing parade. 💚💛💚💛
author: @rogerbear5455

title: Norfolk State Legion | Pass and Review @ Band Fest | Pasadena California
body:
I’m elated with tears of joy! As a former Hot Ice Dancer, I can not be more proud of the LEGION!!!!!
We are not new to THIS! The discipline and sound has existed for years!
OUR LEGACY CONTINUES and I’m so greatful that all of the sweat and tears has come full circle.
The LEGION is AMAZING
Show the world what WE ALREADY KNOW!
BEHOLD THE GREEN & GOLD!
💚💛💚💛💚💛💚💛💚💛
author: @kimquinn2778

title: Norfolk State Legion | Pass and Review @ Band Fest | Pasadena California
body: Very Musical band period.  Definitely one of the best sounding HBCU bands.  Out of the large HBCU bands definitely the best sounding. Great musical arrangements.  NSU definitely has some players. trumpets screaming and the tubas mastered that bass.  I like Snoop Dogg and Dre and that music just like everyone else but this march was just impressive.  Shows the musicality of the band and showmanship of the band. Something that needs to be shown.  Anyone watching this would be impressed.
author: @RoqueFoster

title: Norfolk State Legion | Pass and Review @ Band Fest | Pasadena California
body:
What do they feed those high note trumpet guys? This was a great departure from what you usually see from the bands
during the pass and review portion of this event. Nice job.
author: @DennisJohnsonDrummer

title: Norfolk State Legion | Pass and Review @ Band Fest | Pasadena California
body:
Proud of the Green and Gold!! I am a retiree from NSU and heard it broadcasted that they were being viewed by 50M people, I am sure in various places. I AM PROUD and they marched high and proud on to a victorious show. Behold the Green and Gold!!!!!
Anita E Brabson
author: @anitabrabson6260

title: Norfolk State Legion | Pass and Review @ Band Fest | Pasadena California
body: Pass and Review was very impressive especially the sonorities of the big block sound coupled with clear clean and concise fanfare style separation of lines. Interpretation of the opening selection was very appropriate. Great Job Band!
author: @bugzy46

title: Norfolk State Legion | Pass and Review @ Band Fest | Pasadena California
body: I’ve watched this video so many times and every time with tears in my eyes and chills all over my body I truly truly love this band living in the 757 area and being from this area I am so proud of you all y’all represented the 757 with such class💚💛💚💛
author: @lynnettethompson5442

title: Norfolk State Legion | Pass and Review @ Band Fest | Pasadena California
body: From a Lane College, Jackson, TN Alum, that Pass in Review gave me chills.  HBCU representation strong.  Congratulations Green and Gold!!! 👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽

body: I took a tour of the campus while I was at the AAU track and field nationals this summer, and I loved it. It's been my goal to get into this college ever since.

title: Norfolk State University Campus Tour
body: Great presentation of NSU!  I attended from 1969 to 1971, took a 32 year career break and at the age of 54, came back and finished my degree. This video really highlights the leaps and bounds the University has made over that period of time. Thanks for a great job.
author: @lilbozo11

title: Norfolk State University Campus Tour
body: They did so much to the campus since 00-04... Cafe' in the library??? and fitness center in the student union now, I remember when it was in the maitenance building, lo... I am so glad I see my money has went to awesome upgrades! #BEHOLDTHEGREENANDGOLD!
